data.title: Lucid Group Shares Are On The Rise Today: What You Need To Know
data.description: Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID) shares are trading higher Friday after the company announced that production of its second vehicle, the Gravity SUV, has commenced at its factory in Arizona. Here's what you need to know.

Leveraged ETFs In Focus: Benzinga Hosts Virtual Boot Camp On Trading Strategies
data.description: Learn from industry experts and refine your trading skills with a virtual event by Benzinga. Featuring discussions and case studies on leveraged ETFs, this session aims to equip traders with practical tools for navigating the changing economy.
